# TM Energy

> Solar & EV Solutions for Koh Phangan, Thailand

TM Energy is a solar EPC (Engineering, Procurement, and Construction) company based on Koh Phangan island in Surat Thani province, Thailand. We specialize in rooftop and ground-mount solar panel installations, Power Purchase Agreements (PPA), EV charging station installations, and solar monitoring & maintenance for residential, hospitality, and commercial properties.

## About

TM Energy serves the growing renewable energy needs of Koh Phangan — an island known for its tourism, hospitality industry, and expat community. Electricity on the island is expensive due to reliance on diesel generators and mainland grid infrastructure. Solar energy provides a reliable, cost-effective alternative with typical bill reductions of 50-70%.

We handle the entire solar journey: site survey, system design, equipment procurement (Tier-1 panels from Longi, JA Solar, Canadian Solar), professional installation, PEA net metering paperwork, and ongoing monitoring & maintenance. No permits are required for rooftop installations under 200kW in Thailand.

## Services

### Solar Panel Installation (EPC)
- Full engineering, procurement, and construction
- Residential systems: 5-10 kW (from ฿250,000)
- Commercial/hospitality: 20-50 kW (custom quote)
- Large-scale: 50-500 kW (custom quote)
- Tier-1 panels with 25-year warranty
- Hybrid inverters from Huawei, Growatt, Enphase
- Optional battery storage
- Net metering setup included
- Typical cost: ฿25-35 per Watt-peak installed

### Power Purchase Agreement (PPA)
- Zero upfront cost — we install and own the system
- Customer pays only for electricity produced
- Rate: ฿4.50/kWh (vs PEA grid rate of ฿5-7/kWh)
- Long-term savings with no capital investment
- Available for commercial properties with significant consumption

### EV Charging Solutions
- Level 2 and DC fast charging stations
- Ideal for hotels, resorts, co-working spaces
- Solar-powered charging options
- Attracts eco-conscious travelers and guests

### Solar Monitoring & Maintenance
- Real-time production monitoring dashboards
- Preventive maintenance contracts
- Performance optimization
- 5-year installation warranty included

## Packages

### Island Home (Villa)
- 5-10 kW system
- Tier-1 panels (Longi/JA Solar)
- Hybrid inverter
- Optional battery storage
- Net metering setup
- 5-year installation warranty
- From ฿250,000

### Resort Power (Most Popular)
- 20-50 kW system
- Premium panels + microinverters
- Battery backup option
- Smart monitoring dashboard
- PPA financing available
- Full maintenance contract
- Custom quote

### Island Scale (Enterprise)
- 50-500 kW system
- Full engineering + procurement
- Battery + energy management
- Revenue-grade monitoring
- BOI investment incentives
- Dedicated project manager
- Custom quote

## Key Facts

- Average customer bill reduction: 70%
- System payback period: 3-5 years
- Panel warranty: 25 years
- No permits required for rooftop solar under 200kW
- Koh Phangan receives ~4.5 peak sun hours per day
- Property value increase: 5-10% with solar installation

## Service Area

- Primary: Koh Phangan (Ko Pha-ngan), Surat Thani, Thailand
- Secondary: Koh Samui, Surat Thani province
- Projects considered across Southern Thailand
